steps.title: Use the tangent ratio
steps.content:
Angle $N$ is right, so relative to angle $L$, side $MN$ is opposite and side $LN$ is adjacent.
$$\tan L=\frac{MN}{LN}=\frac{9}{40}$$

steps.title: Find the perimeter
steps.content:
The legs are in the $9$-$40$-$41$ right-triangle ratio, scaled by $3$, so the hypotenuse is $123$. Add the side lengths.
$$27+120+123=270$$
The answer is B.
